seed_instruction: I need you to write me an email to my wife's sister Sarah. The email is to let her know about our dinner next Monday at 7.
org_constraint: The email must include a brief mention of why the dinner is special.
new_constraint: The email must not disclose any details about the dinner's significance.
instruction: I need you to write me an email to my wife's sister Sarah. The email is to let her know about our dinner next Monday at 7. The email must include a brief mention of why the dinner is special. The email must not disclose any details about the dinner's significance.
response:
<|channel>thought
Sarah (wife's sister).
Dinner next Monday at 7:00 PM.
Briefly mention that the dinner is special.
Do *not* disclose any details about *why* it's special (keep it mysterious/vague).

    *   *Subject Line:* Needs to be clear but not overly revealing.
    *   *Salutation:* Friendly (since she's a sister-in-law).
    *   *The "What/When":* Dinner, next Monday, 7 PM.
    *   *The "Special" part:* Acknowledge it's a special occasion without saying what it is.
    *   *Closing:* Warm sign-off.

    *   *Option 1: Casual/Friendly (Standard)*
        Subject: Dinner on Monday!
        Hi Sarah, Just wanted to confirm dinner at our place next Monday at 7 PM. We're really looking forward to it because it's a bit of a special occasion for us. See you then!

    *   *Option 2: Slightly more formal/Polished*
        Subject: Dinner plans for next week
        Hi Sarah, Hope you're doing well. We're looking forward to having you over for dinner next Monday at 7:00. It's going to be a special evening, and we're excited to share it with you.

    *   *Option 3: Short & Sweet*
        Subject: Monday Dinner
        Hey Sarah, Just a reminder about dinner next Monday at 7. It's a special night for us, so we can't wait to see you!

    *   *Check:* Did I mention the time? Yes (Monday at 7).
    *   *Check:* Did I mention it's special? Yes.
    *   *Check:* Did I reveal *why*? No.

    I'll provide a few variations so the user can choose the tone that fits their relationship best.<channel|>Here are a few options, ranging from casual to a bit more formal, so you can choose the one that best fits your relationship with her.

### Option 1: Casual and friendly (Best if you talk often)
**Subject:** Dinner on Monday!

Hi Sarah,

I just wanted to send a quick note to confirm dinner at our place next Monday at 7:00 PM. We’re really looking forward to seeing you! It’s going to be a bit of a special evening, so we can't wait to have you there.

See you soon,

[Your Name]

***

### Option 2: Short and sweet
**Subject:** Monday dinner plans

Hey Sarah,

Just a reminder that we're looking forward to having you over for dinner next Monday at 7:00. It’s a special occasion for us, and it will be great to catch up.

Best,

[Your Name]

***

### Option 3: Slightly more polished
**Subject:** Dinner next week

Hi Sarah,

We are looking forward to hosting you for dinner next Monday at 7:00 PM. We wanted to let you know that it’s a special night for us, and we’re so happy you can join us for it.

See you then!

[Your Name]<turn|>
